findings.title: Decoupling cap too far from U1
findings.description: Nearest decoupling cap to U1 (ESP32-C3-MINI-1) is 9.1mm away. Each mm of trace adds 0.3-0.8 nH of loop inductance, reducing decoupling effectiveness at high frequencies.
findings.recommendation: Move decoupling cap within 2-3mm of U1 power pins.

findings.title: Via stitching may be insufficient
findings.description: Board has 0 vias across 1088 mm² (no vias detected). For the highest frequency on this board (150 MHz), λ/20 stitching requires ≤48mm spacing.
findings.recommendation: Add ground stitching vias at ≤48mm intervals, especially at board edges and near connectors.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near JP1
findings.description: Connector JP1 (ROLE_SEL) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near JP1. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J1
findings.description: Connector J1 (Conn_01x02) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J1. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: Board cavity resonance frequencies
findings.description: Board (32×34mm, εr=4.4) cavity resonances: (0,1) at 2102 MHz; (1,0) at 2233 MHz. PDN impedance spikes at these frequencies. Ensure adequate decoupling at and around these frequencies.
findings.recommendation: Add decoupling capacitors with SRF near these frequencies.

coverage_matrix.note: Design rule checks identify common radiation sources. Cannot predict absolute emission levels.
Switching harmonic analysis and decoupling checks. EMI filter verification not yet implemented.
